TestimonialsCarousel.php: Updated controls bar condition to show when autoplay is enabled: ($showPagination || $showNavigation || $autoplayCarousel)
Added conditional rotation control button (.carousel-autoplay-toggle) as first element in controls bar when $autoplayCarousel is true, with data-label-pause and data-label-play attributes
Initialized $slide_index = 0 and $total_slides = $query->post_count before the slide loop
Added role='group', aria-roledescription='slide', and aria-label with position info (Slide X of Y) to each .swiper-slide div
Added sr-only heading with id='testimonial-video-heading' inside modal
Added inert attribute to modal when hidden
TestimonialsCarousel.js: Added prefersReducedMotion check at top of DOMContentLoaded using window.matchMedia('(prefers-reduced-motion: reduce)').matches
Created autoplayEnabled flag that respects prefers-reduced-motion: element.dataset.autoplay === '1' && !prefersReducedMotion
Updated Swiper autoplay config to include pauseOnMouseEnter: true and disableOnInteraction: false
Implemented carousel-autoplay-toggle click handler with play/pause icon swapping and aria-label updates
Added aria-live management on .swiper-wrapper: 'off' when autoplay is active, 'polite' when paused
Added focusin handler on .swiper-parent to pause autoplay when any carousel element receives focus
Added focusout handler to resume autoplay only if focus leaves carousel entirely and user has not explicitly stopped rotation
Added slideChange event handler to manage inert attribute on non-visible slides (only when loop mode is disabled)
Updated modal openModal function to update sr-only heading text instead of aria-label, and remove inert attribute
Updated modal closeModal function to add inert attribute when modal is hidden
swiper.css: Added .carousel-nav-btn:focus-visible styles with ring-2 ring-white ring-offset-2 ring-offset-charcoal for visible focus indicators on dark backgrounds
Pause.svg: Copied Pause.svg icon from blocks/DynamicContentCarousel/resources/ to blocks/TestimonialsCarousel/resources/

gaps_addressed.GAP-2: FIXED - Added role='group', aria-roledescription='slide', and aria-label with position info to all slides
gaps_addressed.GAP-3: FIXED - Added rotation control button as first tab-stop with dynamic aria-label
gaps_addressed.GAP-4: FIXED - Implemented focusin/focusout handlers for focus-based autoplay pause
gaps_addressed.GAP-7: FIXED - Added prefers-reduced-motion check to disable autoplay
gaps_addressed.GAP-8: IMPROVED - Switched from aria-label to aria-labelledby with sr-only heading, added inert attribute management
gaps_addressed.GAP-10: FIXED - Implemented inert attribute management on non-visible slides (when loop mode is disabled)

notes: All WAI-ARIA Carousel pattern requirements have been implemented following the DynamicContentCarousel reference implementation
The implementation respects prefers-reduced-motion by disabling autoplay entirely when the user preference is set
Focus-based autoplay pause is implemented with resume only when focus leaves the carousel and the user has not explicitly stopped rotation
Inert attribute management on slides is only applied when loop mode is disabled, to avoid conflicts with Swiper's loop clones
Modal improvements include aria-labelledby with sr-only heading and inert attribute for better accessibility
Build passed with only existing size warnings (no new errors introduced)
Linter found pre-existing warnings in other blocks but no new errors in TestimonialsCarousel files
The TSX file requires no changes as it uses FilteredServerSideRender which auto-reflects PHP changes
